name: Munich (Bavaria, Germany)

colors.symbolism: the colour of the Munich monk (Munchner Kindl) habit
the gold of the city's medieval livery

description: A horizontal bicolour of yellow over black in equal widths.
history: Munich's yellow-and-black colours derive from the Munchner Kindl (the monk in the city's coat of arms) and from the medieval livery of the city. The plain bicolour is the city's general flag; an alternate version places the city's coat of arms on the centre.

features.symbolism: the historic colours of Munich, derived from the Munchner Kindl
